heading: Exemption from antitrust laws
label: 40307 Exemption from antitrust laws

children.text: an agreement (including an assessment agreement) that has been filed and is effective under this chapter;
an agreement that is exempt under from any requirement of this part;section 40103 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: pursuant to an agreement on file with the Federal Maritime Commission and in effect when the activity takes place; or

children.label: B
children.text: exempt under from any filing or publication requirement of this part;section 40103 of this title

an agreement or activity relating to transportation services within or between foreign countries, whether or not via the United States, unless the agreement or activity has a direct, substantial, and reasonably foreseeable effect on the commerce of the United States;
an agreement or activity relating to the foreign inland segment of through transportation that is part of transportation provided in a United States import or export trade;
an agreement or activity to provide wharfage, dock, warehouse, or other terminal facilities outside the United States; or

an agreement, modification, or cancellation approved before , by the Commission under section 15 of the Shipping Act, 1916, or permitted under section 14b of that Act, and any properly published tariff, rate, fare, or charge, or classification, rule, or regulation explanatory thereof implementing that agreement, modification, or cancellation.June 18, 1984
an agreement with or among air carriers, rail carriers, motor carriers, tug operators, or common carriers by water not subject to this part relating to transportation within the United States;
a discussion or agreement among common carriers subject to this part relating to the inland divisions (as opposed to the inland portions) of through rates within the United States;
an agreement among common carriers subject to this part to establish, operate, or maintain a marine terminal in the United States; or

children.heading: .—Retroactive Effect of Determinations
children.label: c .—Retroactive Effect of Determinations
children.text: A determination by an agency or court that results in the denial or removal of the immunity to the antitrust laws under subsection (a) does not remove or alter the antitrust immunity for the period before the determination.

children.heading: .—Relief Under Clayton Act
children.label: d .—Relief Under Clayton Act
children.text: A person may not recover damages under section 4 of the Clayton Act (), or obtain injunctive relief under section 16 of that Act (), for conduct prohibited by this part.15 U.S.C. 1515 U.S.C. 26
